column5: A sophisticated AI coding agent and operating system for software work, known for its advanced architecture, memory management, ability to build websites and dashboards, and convert files in bulk. It serves as a blueprint for other agent harnesses.

An AI assistant with mobile access to workplace tools (Figma, Canva, Amplitude), computer use capabilities (controlling Mac's screen, Auto Mode), useful for finding space on computers, creating Excel dashboards from CSVs, researching meeting participants, analyzing communications, getting detailed company information, and as a business guru for planning, financials, recipes, website setup, SEO, and copy. Also used for editing and refining writing.

The most complete chatbot experience, capable of creating skill-style workflows, building and updating spreadsheets from natural language, and integrated into various platforms for lead generation and operating systems.

An AI coding agent supporting automations and offering plugins to integrate with various work applications like Slack, Figma, Notion, Gmail, and Google Drive for planning, research, and coordination. Also useful for bug hunting.

A multimodal chatbot that allows users to import chat history and personal context from other AI assistants, aiming for continuity and ease of use. Gemini Live is powered by Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, processing text, images, audio, and video, outperforming others in following complex voice instructions.

Turns your voice into clean, formatted text in any app, dictating at 4x the speed of typing, stripping filler words, fixing grammar, and formatting automatically. Works everywhere and on every device.

A self-referential agent system (also known as Darwin Godel Machine Hyperagents) that integrates a task agent and a meta agent to iteratively improve performance on arbitrary tasks, including prompt generation and system modification.

An AI coder trusted by teams at Stripe, OpenAI, and NVIDIA, that helps build high-quality software faster by allowing users to choose from various frontier models, code with a codebase-aware agent, and run multiple agents in parallel.
An AI agent framework being deployed in robots in China, powering household robots, integrated into humanoids for real-time navigation, and used for natural language control of robotic arms.

A platform that combines different data sources to create synthetic datasets and "digital twins" of the human body for simulating body functions, testing procedures, training surgical robots, and predicting medical issues or physical performance.
A lower-cost video generation model from Google DeepMind, available via the Gemini API, supporting text-to-video and image-to-video tasks with various resolutions, formats, and clip durations.

A new agentic system that deploys teams of digital employees to handle complex business tasks 24/7, from e-commerce setup and supplier negotiations to logistics and VAT filing prep, enabling businesses to define outcomes and let agents handle execution.

Anthropic's new AI model, a significant step up from the Opus series, performing well in reasoning, coding, and cybersecurity, particularly in finding software flaws and solving complex technical tasks for enterprise use.

Autonomous AI tools that can take action across applications, systems, and workflows, increasingly integrated into business operations and used for strengthening cybersecurity, threat detection, incident response, and resilience.
Open-source 2B ASR model supporting 14 languages, optimized for low word error rate, achieved top accuracy on the Hugging Face Open ASR leaderboard.
Google's music AI that can create songs up to three minutes long from text prompts, allowing users to request specific song parts and use photos or videos as inspiration.
A new AI assistant that allows users to build custom algorithms and personalized feeds using plain language, with a future goal of enabling AI-assisted app building.

An AI-native service providing high-volume, high-speed automated end-to-end test coverage for web and mobile applications, aiming to reduce QA cycles and enable engineering teams to move faster with guaranteed zero flakes.

Connects company docs, projects, code, decisions, & people into a single, permissions-aware layer to help find answers and do work, such as turning meeting notes into project plans, pulling relevant documents for new projects, and summarizing project updates.
AI music tool that creates songs up to three minutes long from text prompts, allows control over song structure, can write lyrics and use visual inspiration, integrated into various Google products.
An enterprise AI app with agent support that expanded from a meeting notetaker, offering enhanced productivity features.

Real-time speech-to-speech voice agent capabilities via streaming API, removes text from the pipeline for reduced delay and intact tone/pacing/intent, supports 90+ languages, continuous stateful sessions, filters background noise, built-in function calling, new voice model geared towards making audio AI more fluid and natural, allows for 2X longer conversations, faster responses with fewer awkward pauses, and tone adjustment depending on context.

Alibaba's full omnimodal large language model with text, image, audio, and video understanding, supporting extensive audio and video processing and multiple languages, surpassing benchmarks in audio reasoning and speech.
An AI tool that builds forms from text or voice descriptions, incorporating features like conditional logic, autoresponder email, and conversion best practices.
An AI CRM that connects to other tools, flags churn risk, and turns customer feedback into projects, praised for bridging the gap between customer data and apps.

Apple's personal AI agent, reportedly being rebuilt as a standalone app with deeper on-device intelligence, enhanced conversational skills, AI-powered search, and the ability to control Apple and third-party apps with voice commands.

4B parameter open-weight text-to-speech model for expressive multilingual speech generation, low latency, supports 9 languages, models tone/accent/speaking style, outperforms ElevenLabs v2.5 Flash in human evaluation for voice quality.

Connects coding workflows with external tools like Slack, Figma, Notion, and Gmail; runs tasks including planning, research, and coordination before and after writing code; packages workflows and tool access into reusable units called skills.
Uses real-time reinforcement learning to train on production data and ship updates every five hours, allowing for rapid improvement.

Open-source foundation model that predicts human brain activity across vision, audio, and language modalities, trained on 700 volunteers, aims to accelerate medical research breakthroughs and better understanding/treating neurological disorders.
